decisions.decision: Default video quality set to 1080p (good) instead of best
decisions.reason: 1080p is the sweet spot for most use cases; saves bandwidth while maintaining quality

decisions.decision: Force MP4 output container for all video downloads
decisions.reason: Consistent format; MP4 is universally compatible. Added --merge-output-format mp4 and --remux-video mp4

decisions.decision: Per-entry quality selection for playlist downloads
decisions.reason: Each video in a playlist may have different available qualities; users need granular control

patterns.name: Format Preference Pipeline
patterns.description: buildVideoFormatPreference(WebDownloadSettings) -> yt-dlp format string. Uses height caps: best=null, good=1080, normal=720, bad=480, worst=360

patterns.name: Per-Entry Format Override
patterns.description: perEntryFormats map in playlist download allows overriding the global format for specific videos. Key=entryId, Value=yt-dlp format string

gotchas.issue: buildVideoFormatPreference takes WebDownloadSettings object, NOT raw string args
gotchas.fix: Pass full settings object, spread with override for per-entry: { ...settings, oneClickQuality: preset }

gotchas.issue: Hydration mismatch on ON/OFF badge in download-dialog-layout.tsx
gotchas.fix: Add suppressHydrationWarning to the span element - state depends on localStorage which differs SSR vs client

gotchas.issue: FormatList import from single-video-download was removed but references remained in playlist-download
gotchas.fix: Replaced with simple Select dropdown showing concrete resolutions (Best 4K+, 1080p, 720p, etc.)

gotchas.issue: Cannot find module errors for @vidbee/* and node:* in IDE
gotchas.fix: These are monorepo path mapping issues in the IDE's TypeScript server. Runtime works fine in Docker. Not blocking.
